domain: Tibetan Nechung State Oracle (deity Pehar/Dorje Drakden possesses kuten medium; trance speech recorded + monks interpret; multi-stage personal-Q vs government-Q phases; final council pronouncement)
specific_mechanism: NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL: 3-tier trance-medium-council multi-stage LLM evaluation pipeline. (1) Tier 1 (trance/raw generation): base LLM generates uncalibrated raw response r_raw to query q. (2) Tier 2 (medium-interpret): interpreter-LLM rewrites r_raw into structured interpretation r_interp + identifies ambiguities/confidence intervals. (3) Tier 3 (council-deliberate): K judge-LLMs deliberate over r_interp; majority/consensus produces r_final pronouncement. (4) Question-class routing: personal-Q (single-user) vs government-Q (multi-stakeholder) → distinct tier-2 interpreter rubrics. (5) Differs from R456 JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE multi-stage tribunal (Tibetan sky-burial source — distinct culture/mechanism).
llm_application: NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL 3-tier trance-medium-council pipeline + question-class routing + multi-stage pronouncement evaluation. Differs from R359 ETRUSCAN-HARUSPEX (liver). R430 KINTSUGI-CRACK (gold-repair). R418 SUTARTINES-EVAL (different). R445 IFA-BINARY (256-tree). R456 JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE (closest, multi-stage Tibetan tribunal — same Tibetan culture but different jhator vs nechung mechanism). R466 ROMANI-KRIS. R481 KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE (harmonic-partial). Differs from LLMs-as-Judges Survey (single-stage). Multi-Turn Dialogue Evaluator 2508.00454 (multiple judges → ensemble, not 3-tier pipeline). Multi-Turn LLM Eval 2026 (multi-turn). Differs by EXPLICIT 3-TIER RAW→INTERPRET→COUNCIL PIPELINE + QUESTION-CLASS ROUTING + TRANCE-MEDIUM INTERMEDIARY LAYER.
novelty_claim: LLMs-as-Judges + Multi-Turn Dialogue Evaluator + Multi-Turn 2026 cover multi-stage LLM-eval paradigm. NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL adds (a) explicit 3-tier raw→interpret→council pipeline + (b) question-class routing per-tier + (c) trance-medium intermediary. Recombination — borderline lookup.

tier-1 raw + tier-2 interpret + tier-3 consensus
